overview.title: 12 Teachings of Wisdom
overview.text: Each figure has 12 historical teachings of wisdom. Each star represents one teaching. Bright stars you've explored, dim ones are waiting for you.

howToPlay.title: How it works
points: The glowing gold star is your next teaching.
Click a star. A panel shows your next step.
A pulsing star shows your current selection.
Work through the 4 chapters: Story, Wisdom, Prism, Quest.

constellation.title: Your Constellation
constellation.text: Your constellation grows with every completed chapter. The more teachings you explore, the more connections become visible, until your unique wisdom pattern shines.
constellation.chapterCompletion: A star blooms when all four chapters of one teaching are complete: the full story listened to, 15 exchanges in Wisdom dialogue, the prism explored, and the 4 questions of Quest answered.

revelation.title: Progress
revelation.text: The progress bar at the bottom shows your status per teaching and chapter.

tools.title: More tools
points: List: All 12 teachings at a glance, with full details to read
Facts: Historically verified facts about the figure
Progress bar: Shows your status per teaching and chapter
Community: Browse what others want next. Your voting power grows with every completed figure.

patternHelp.discoveryText: All 12 Star Seeds are visible. Bright stars show explored teachings, dim ones await discovery. Click any star to explore.
patternHelp.zodiacText: Your explored Star Seeds form a unique pattern. The more chapters you complete, the clearer your constellation becomes.

revelation.void: Explore your first Star Seed to awaken the constellation.
revelation.awakening: First awakening! Faint connection lines become visible.
revelation.emergence: The pattern is forming. More and more connections appear.
revelation.forming: The constellation is taking shape. Golden lines show your progress.
revelation.complete: Wisdom complete! Your constellation shines in full glory.

firstTime.title: Choose Your Echo
firstTime.text: Select a historical figure to begin your journey. Each brings unique wisdom from their time and culture.

welcome.title: Begin Your Quest
welcome.text: Engage in deep dialogue to unlock Star Seeds. The more thoughtfully you converse, the more wisdom you'll gather.

overview.title: What to expect
overview.text: The figure narrates their own wisdom as a first-person story. 10 to 15 minutes, historically grounded.

journey.title: 12 stories that build on each other
points: 1 to 4: The beginnings
5 to 8: The teaching deepens
9 to 12: Mastery

nextSteps.title: After that
nextSteps.text: In the Wisdom chapter, you can talk directly with the figure about the teaching.

transparency.title: Notice
transparency.expanded: Stories are created through human-AI collaboration and narrated with synthetic voice. Educational purpose.

overview.title: Philosophical Treasury
overview.text: 12 teachings of wisdom per figure, each a complete philosophical teaching with historical sources, practical exercises, and cross-cultural connections. Explore at your own pace.

depth.title: Each Teaching Contains
points: Deep philosophical description
Guided practice exercise for daily life
Original quotes from source texts
4 connections to other wisdom traditions
Difficulty level and practice type

navigation.title: How to Explore
points: Click any seed title to expand full content
Seeds 1 to 4: Foundation, 5 to 8: Development, 9 to 12: Mastery
Follow connections to discover related wisdom

example.text: Example: Laozi's 'Wu Wei' connects to Marcus Aurelius on natural action, Einstein on flow states, and Rumi on surrender. Showing universal patterns across cultures.

overview.title: Quick Guide
overview.text: All conversations organized by Star Seed. Click titles to expand. Use colored buttons to filter by chapter.

actions.title: Key Actions
points: Backup and restore your complete journey
Clear individual seeds or all history
Generate AI summaries of long chats
Filter by chapter using colored buttons

tip.text: Active seed has golden glow. FreeTalk at bottom.

overview.title: What to expect
overview.text: Multiple figures engage in a philosophical dialogue about your question. Different perspectives from different centuries.

modes.title: Two styles
points: 🔥 Confrontational: The figures debate. Viewpoints collide.
🌊 Reflective: The figures think together. Different perspectives, one topic.

curated.title: Curated councils
curated.text: Pre-built councils on 8 life themes. Figures and question are already chosen. Just pick one and go.

building.title: Build your own
building.text: Choose a moderator and up to 3 figures. Write your question and pick your style. The moderator leads the conversation.

transparency.brief: Philosophical dialogue · Not a substitute for professional counseling

echoExplainer.title: What is an Echo?

concept.title: Living Perspectives
concept.text: An echo carries a figure's perspective and way of thinking into the present. They know about the modern world, but see everything through their own lens, their own era, their own philosophy. We try to shape each echo with care, in word and image.

howTheyWork.title: How Echoes Work
points: Conversations and voices are generated entirely by AI
Echoes discuss modern topics through their historical perspective
Grounded in documented writings and teachings

goodToKnow.title: Good to Know
points: Not the real historical figures, but AI interpretations
Not full biographies, but the teachings they represent
May sometimes get things wrong. Verify with primary sources

echoExplainer.quote: When you meet Plato here, you engage with an AI echo of his philosophy, not the person himself.

denied.title: Microphone Access Denied
denied.ios:
To enable microphone access:
1. Open Settings app
2. Scroll to Safari
3. Enable Microphone access
denied.android:
To enable microphone access:
1. Tap the lock icon in the address bar
2. Go to Site Settings
3. Enable Microphone
denied.desktop: Please allow microphone access in your browser settings and try again.

notFound.title: No Microphone Detected
notFound.message: No microphone was found on your device. Please connect a microphone and try again.

notReadable.title: Microphone In Use
notReadable.message: Your microphone is currently being used by another application. Please close other apps and try again.

security.title: Security Error
security.message: Microphone access requires a secure connection (HTTPS). Please ensure you are using HTTPS.

generic.title: Microphone Error
generic.message: Could not access your microphone. Please check your settings and try again.

mic.fallback: You can also type your question instead.
